arts.ttl: Tomoki Iwata nets another stunner as Celtic's one that got away leaves Birmingham teammates shocked

arts.ttl: ‘Who were Manchester City...' David Martindale's passionate rant about Celtic in the Champions League
arts.sum: “I think it’s hard even looking at us (Livi) last year, you come in and you are coaching a certain style for a game, then you are Aberdeen away, Hibs away, Rangers at home and Celtic away. The Livingston boss added that money dictates success and that it’s hard ‘chopping and changing’ your style.

arts.ttl: Danny Murphy suspects Brendan Rodgers is about throw a Celtic curveball vs Atalanta
arts.sum: The Celtic boss took aim at the media for their criticism of his team’s result against the Bundesliga club but former Liverpool midfielder, Danny Murphy says he understood why Rodgers decided to attack Dortmund on matchday two. Murphy told talkSPORT, “I think Celtic are so used to dominating teams in games that maybe it is difficult to adapt quickly.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers 'pulling the wool' over Atalanta eyes as bullish Celtic press conference decoded
arts.sum: The boss has vowed to stick to his guns despite a hammering at the hands of Dortmund

arts.ttl: Gabby Agbonlahor explains how Celtic have 'got a chance' of beating Atalanta amid McCoist's verdict
arts.sum: Celtic fans are under no illusion that tonight’s Champions League tie at Atalanta is going to be a tough test for Brendan Rodgers’ Bhoys. Ally McCoist reacted to his co-host’s comments and said that despite Celtic’s ‘amazing’ performance against Slovan Bratislava, the former Rangers man predicts a ‘very tough’ night for Brendan Rodgers .

arts.ttl: What Brendan Rodgers told Kasper Schmeichel that made the decision to join Celtic 'easy'
arts.sum: However, Rodgers identified the big Dane as his man and Schmeichel signed for Celtic in July and he has not looked back since. “When a club the size of Celtic comes and wants you to play for them, the conversation can’t have been much more than five or ten minutes long.”
